name: Percy Jackson
description:
"Real Man" - Beabadoobee

Guess no one ever taught you how to be a real man

Would you hold it down and take it if I gave you a chance?

Need the reassurance, baby, not a silly romance Guess I'm used to being disappointed, falling too fast

If you want it, go and get it, and I hope you last

(Image is from Pinterest by fefox!)
creator: Stars4uu
